## Summary

## Validation

- [ ] CI Gate is green or this PR is docs-only/light-path eligible
- [ ] CodeQL and Dependency Review are green or have no actionable findings
- [ ] CodeRabbit and Codex review findings are resolved or explicitly accepted
- [ ] Repo-local lint/typecheck/test commands, if present
- [ ] cpl-ops/cpl-brand references checked
- [ ] Deploy or staging smoke, if relevant

## Risk

> **Review gate:** one agentic reviewer (Codex **or** CodeRabbit) approving the current head satisfies the merge gate — you do not need both; either requesting changes blocks. (ADR-0023/0024, 2026-06-29.)
